description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a predominantly yellow and black cover featuring a dynamic, high-contrast illustration of a running figure. The front cover is visually busy, with layered graphic elements and a cut-out or sticker-like detail near the top center. The book's spine is bold, with vertical text and a yellow background, making it easily identifiable on a shelf. The back cover contains several blocks of white text, including praise and a barcode at the bottom. The book appears to have a dust jacket, as evidenced by the glossy, slightly wrinkled cover and the visible flap on the inside. The pages are white and densely packed, indicating a substantial volume.
description: A yellow and black hardcover book with a dynamic illustrated cover, bold spine, and visible dust jacket. The book is thick, with dense white pages and detailed graphic elements.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a yellow background with a black running figure and layered graphic elements.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, revealing the thickness of the pages and the inside flap of the dust jacket.
description_view_2: The back cover is shown, featuring blocks of white text, a barcode, and a continuation of the yellow and black color scheme.
description_view_3: The spine and part of the front cover are visible, highlighting the vertical title text and the yellow spine design.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover features a stylized, high-contrast image of a running human figure in black, set against a bright yellow background. There is a layered, collage-like effect with a rectangular cut-out or sticker element near the top center, adding visual interest and depth.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is yellow with bold, black vertical text running from top to bottom. There is a small black rectangle at the top with white text, and the overall design is clean and modern.
